title: Working with Sybase
text: Working with Sybase To use databases, you often have to change your system setup so that the connectors you require are ready for use. This can involve installing, configuring, converting, binding, migrating, and upgrading so that the connectors meet your requirements. Create Tables for Modeled Entities Back Up the Data Set the Sybase Packet Size Upgrade to Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking Use Row-Level, Data Pages, and All Pages Locking Was this topic helpful?
